item.title: Introduction!
item.description:
Hey hey hello and welcome to my personal/hobby/knowledge-base/a bit of everything blog!

My name is Ash and I go by they/them pronouns. I’m 21 and live in Europe.

My interests are many, but these are the main ones you can expect to find here:

  • Tech
    (programming, linux, single board computers, homelab, etc.)

  • Art,
    particularly crafts, but there’s some painters and digital artists I like too! I just don’t do that myself :)

  • Music
    (making, listening, theory,vocaloid, synthv, etc.)

  • Videogames
    (pokemon, touhou, minecraft, terraria, animal crossing, girls' frontline, azur lane when it doesn’t get overtly adult, etc.)

  • Amateur Radio
    AKA HAM radio! specifically software defined radio.

  • Cooking,
    mostly plant based, baking included

  • Miscellaneous
    Anime/manga, SCP, stationary collecting (stickers!!)

What to expect

I’ll be upfront, this is a bit of an everything-I-like sort of place. I love to yap! But you can filter by tag to see the stuff you’re interested in :)

I’ll post processes and results for some of my projects (such as tech projects, crafts or recipes), infodumping sessions on whatever I’m into at the moment, and much more.

If you want to link your personal website or blog on my website, let me know! The indie web is such a treasure in an age of megacorps.

item.title: Links
item.description:
To use this feature, add links section to frontmatter.

This page’s frontmatter:

1
2
3
4
5
6
7
8
9

links:
 - title: GitHub
 description: GitHub is the world's largest software development platform.
 website: https://github.com
 image: https://github.githubassets.com/images/modules/logos_page/GitHub-Mark.png
 - title: TypeScript
 description: TypeScript is a typed superset of JavaScript that compiles to plain JavaScript.
 website: https://www.typescriptlang.org
 image: ts-logo-128.jpg

image field accepts both local and external images.
